allow: Bash(bash euxis-ops/templates/create_euxis_package.sh euxis-identity && bash euxis-ops/templates/create_euxis_package.sh euxis-inference && bash euxis-ops/templates/create_euxis_package.sh euxis-a2a)
Bash(which pytest && pytest --version 2>/dev/null; ls .venv/bin/pytest 2>/dev/null; pip3 show pytest 2>/dev/null | head -3)

Bash(git add \\
  euxis-ops/benchmarks/runner.py \\
  euxis-ops/benchmarks/autonomy_bench.py \\
  euxis-ops/benchmarks/interop_bench.py \\
  euxis-ops/benchmarks/performance_bench.py \\
  euxis-ops/benchmarks/portability_bench.py \\
  euxis-ops/benchmarks/security_bench.py \\
  euxis-data/perf/benchmark-results.json)

Bash(git add -A && git commit -S -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
chore: bump version to v0.0.3 and replace ASCII logo with compact E

- Replace large EUXIS ASCII banner with compact E logo across 6 files
- Fix broken ANSI escape codes in euxis entrypoint \(space 0x20 -> \\033\)
- Bump version from v0.0.2 to v0.0.3 across all 200+ files

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
